text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, May 18. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
